papers.title: AI Can Learn Scientific Taste
papers.abstract: Great scientists have strong judgement and foresight, closely tied to what we call scientific taste. Here, we use the term to refer to the capacity to judge and propose research ideas with high potential impact. However, most relative research focuses on improving an AI scientist's executive capability, while enhancing an AI's scientific taste remains underexplored. In this work, we propose Reinforcement Learning from Community Feedback (RLCF), a training paradigm that uses large-scale community signals as supervision, and formulate scientific taste learning as a preference modeling and alignment problem. For preference modeling, we train Scientific Judge on 700K field- and time-matched pairs of high- vs. low-citation papers to judge ideas. For preference alignment, using Scientific Judge as a reward model, we train a policy model, Scientific Thinker, to propose research ideas with high potential impact. Experiments show Scientific Judge outperforms SOTA LLMs (e.g., GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Pro) and generalizes to future-year test, unseen fields, and peer-review preference. Furthermore, Scientific Thinker proposes research ideas with higher potential impact than baselines. Our findings show that AI can learn scientific taste, marking a key step toward reaching human-level AI scientists.

structured_summary.chinese_title: AI 可以学习科学品味
structured_summary.chinese_summary: 提出了一种新的训练框架 RLCF，使 AI 能够具备科学品味，从而提出具有高潜在影响的研究想法。
structured_summary.pain_point: 现有研究主要集中在提高 AI 科学家的执行能力，而增强 AI 的科学品味则较少被探索。
structured_summary.core_value: 通过 RLCF 训练框架，AI 可以学习科学品味，提出具有高潜在影响的研究想法。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: 使用强化学习和社区反馈作为监督，将科学品味学习建模为偏好建模和对齐问题。
structured_summary.quantitative_results: 实验表明，Scientific Judge 的表现优于 SOTA LLMs，并且 Scientific Thinker 提出的研究想法具有更高的潜在影响。
structured_summary.competitors: 对比了 GPT-5.2 和 Gemini 3 Pro 等基线模型。
structured_summary.limitations: 未来需要进一步探索如何将更多领域知识融入模型。
key_contributions: 提出了 RLCF 训练框架
将科学品味学习建模为偏好建模和对齐问题
实验验证了模型的有效性
technical_highlights: 使用大规模社区信号作为监督
提出了一种新的偏好建模和对齐方法

papers.title: OpenSeeker: Democratizing Frontier Search Agents by Fully Open-Sourcing Training Data
papers.abstract: Deep search capabilities have become an indispensable competency for frontier Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet the development of high-performance search agents remains dominated by industrial giants due to a lack of transparent, high-quality training data. This persistent data scarcity has fundamentally hindered the progress of the broader research community in developing and innovating within this domain. To bridge this gap, we introduce OpenSeeker, the first fully open-source search agent (i.e., model and data) that achieves frontier-level performance through two core technical innovations: (1) Fact-grounded scalable controllable QA synthesis, which reverse-engineers the web graph via topological expansion and entity obfuscation to generate complex, multi-hop reasoning tasks with controllable coverage and complexity. (2) Denoised trajectory synthesis, which employs a retrospective summarization mechanism to denoise the trajectory, therefore promoting the teacher LLMs to generate high-quality actions. Experimental results demonstrate that OpenSeeker, trained (a single training run) on only 11.7k synthesized samples, achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks including BrowseComp, BrowseComp-ZH, xbench-DeepSearch, and WideSearch. Notably, trained with simple SFT, OpenSeeker significantly outperforms the second-best fully open-source agent DeepDive (e.g., 29.5% v.s. 15.3% on BrowseComp), and even surpasses industrial competitors such as Tongyi DeepResearch (trained via extensive continual pre-training, SFT, and RL) on BrowseComp-ZH (48.4% v.s. 46.7%). We fully open-source the complete training dataset and the model weights to democratize frontier search agent research and foster a more transparent, collaborative ecosystem.

structured_summary.chinese_title: OpenSeeker: 通过全面开源训练数据民主化前沿搜索代理
structured_summary.chinese_summary: OpenSeeker 是首个全面开源的搜索代理，通过两项核心技术创新实现前沿级性能。
structured_summary.pain_point: 缺乏透明且高质量的训练数据阻碍了搜索代理的发展。
structured_summary.core_value: OpenSeeker 通过开源数据和模型促进了搜索代理领域的研究和创新。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: 采用基于事实的可扩展可控问答合成和去噪轨迹合成技术。
structured_summary.quantitative_results: OpenSeeker 使用 11.7k 合成样本训练，达到多项基准的最先进性能。
structured_summary.limitations: 未来需要进一步扩大训练数据规模。
key_contributions: 全面开源搜索代理模型和数据
提出基于事实的可扩展可控问答合成
提出去噪轨迹合成技术
application_scenarios: 大型语言模型搜索能力提升
复杂多跳推理任务生成
technical_highlights: 实现前沿级性能仅需少量合成样本
两项核心技术创新显著提升性能

papers.title: EnterpriseOps-Gym: Environments and Evaluations for Stateful Agentic Planning and Tool Use in Enterprise Settings
papers.abstract: Large language models are shifting from passive information providers to active agents intended for complex workflows. However, their deployment as reliable AI workers in enterprise is stalled by benchmarks that fail to capture the intricacies of professional environments, specifically, the need for long-horizon planning amidst persistent state changes and strict access protocols. In this work, we introduce EnterpriseOps-Gym, a benchmark designed to evaluate agentic planning in realistic enterprise settings. Specifically, EnterpriseOps-Gym features a containerized sandbox with 164 database tables and 512 functional tools to mimic real-world search friction. Within this environment, agents are evaluated on 1,150 expert-curated tasks across eight mission-critical verticals (including Customer Service, HR, and IT). Our evaluation of 14 frontier models reveals critical limitations in state-of-the-art models: the top-performing Claude Opus 4.5 achieves only 37.4% success. Further analysis shows that providing oracle human plans improves performance by 14-35 percentage points, pinpointing strategic reasoning as the primary bottleneck. Additionally, agents frequently fail to refuse infeasible tasks (best model achieves 53.9%), leading to unintended and potentially harmful side effects. Our findings underscore that current agents are not yet ready for autonomous enterprise deployment. More broadly, EnterpriseOps-Gym provides a concrete testbed to advance the robustness of agentic planning in professional workflows.

structured_summary.chinese_title: EnterpriseOps-Gym: 企业环境中的状态化智能体规划和工具使用评估环境
structured_summary.chinese_summary: 引入EnterpriseOps-Gym评估大型语言模型在企业环境中的智能体规划能力。
structured_summary.pain_point: 现有基准无法捕捉企业环境中的长期规划需求和持续状态变化。
structured_summary.core_value: 提供了一个模拟真实企业环境的评估平台，突出战略推理的重要性。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: 使用容器化沙箱和专家策划的任务集进行评估。
structured_summary.quantitative_results: 最顶尖模型Claude Opus 4.5的成功率仅为37.4%，提供oracle计划可提升14-35个百分点。
structured_summary.limitations: 强调了战略推理作为主要瓶颈。
key_contributions: 引入了EnterpriseOps-Gym评估环境
展示了战略推理的重要性
提供了详细的实验结果和分析
technical_highlights: 包含164个数据库表和512个功能工具的容器化沙箱
覆盖八个关键垂直领域

papers.title: HSImul3R: Physics-in-the-Loop Reconstruction of Simulation-Ready Human-Scene Interactions
papers.abstract: We present HSImul3R, a unified framework for simulation-ready 3D reconstruction of human-scene interactions (HSI) from casual captures, including sparse-view images and monocular videos. Existing methods suffer from a perception-simulation gap: visually plausible reconstructions often violate physical constraints, leading to instability in physics engines and failure in embodied AI applications. To bridge this gap, we introduce a physically-grounded bi-directional optimization pipeline that treats the physics simulator as an active supervisor to jointly refine human dynamics and scene geometry. In the forward direction, we employ Scene-targeted Reinforcement Learning to optimize human motion under dual supervision of motion fidelity and contact stability. In the reverse direction, we propose Direct Simulation Reward Optimization, which leverages simulation feedback on gravitational stability and interaction success to refine scene geometry. We further present HSIBench, a new benchmark with diverse objects and interaction scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HSImul3R produces the first stable, simulation-ready HSI reconstructions and can be directly deployed to real-world humanoid robots.

structured_summary.chinese_title: HSImul3R: 物理在环的人景交互模拟准备三维重建
structured_summary.chinese_summary: HSImul3R 是一种统一框架，可以从稀疏视角图像和单目视频中重建稳定且可用于物理模拟的人景交互场景。
structured_summary.pain_point: 现有方法在重建人景交互时往往违反物理约束，导致物理引擎不稳定和AI应用失败。
structured_summary.core_value: 通过物理约束下的双向优化，HSImul3R 能够生成稳定且可用于物理模拟的人景交互三维重建。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: HSImul3R 使用场景导向的强化学习优化人体运动，并利用模拟反馈优化场景几何。
structured_summary.limitations: 需要更多实际场景数据以进一步验证模型的鲁棒性。
key_contributions: 引入物理约束下的双向优化框架
提出直接利用模拟反馈优化场景几何的方法
technical_highlights: 物理在环的双向优化
结合强化学习和模拟反馈

papers.title: Grounding World Simulation Models in a Real-World Metropolis
papers.abstract: What if a world simulation model could render not an imagined environment but a city that actually exists? Prior generative world models synthesize visually plausible yet artificial environments by imagining all content. We present Seoul World Model (SWM), a city-scale world model grounded in the real city of Seoul. SWM anchors autoregressive video generation through retrieval-augmented conditioning on nearby street-view images. However, this design introduces several challenges, including temporal misalignment between retrieved references and the dynamic target scene, limited trajectory diversity and data sparsity from vehicle-mounted captures at sparse intervals. We address these challenges through cross-temporal pairing, a large-scale synthetic dataset enabling diverse camera trajectories, and a view interpolation pipeline that synthesizes coherent training videos from sparse street-view images. We further introduce a Virtual Lookahead Sink to stabilize long-horizon generation by continuously re-grounding each chunk to a retrieved image at a future location. We evaluate SWM against recent video world models across three cities: Seoul, Busan, and Ann Arbor. SWM outperforms existing methods in generating spatially faithful, temporally consistent, long-horizon videos grounded in actual urban environments over trajectories reaching hundreds of meters, while supporting diverse camera movements and text-prompted scenario variations.

structured_summary.chinese_title: 在真实城市中构建世界模拟模型
structured_summary.chinese_summary: 提出了基于首尔的真实城市规模世界模型，显著提升了模拟视频的真实性和多样性。
structured_summary.pain_point: 现有生成模型难以模拟真实存在的城市环境。
structured_summary.core_value: 通过检索增强条件生成和视图插值，实现了真实城市规模的动态视频生成。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: 结合跨时间配对和视图插值，生成连贯的训练视频。
structured_summary.limitations: 未来需要进一步提高生成视频的多样性。
key_contributions: 提出了基于真实城市的真实规模世界模型
引入了跨时间配对和视图插值技术
增强了生成视频的真实性和连贯性
technical_highlights: 检索增强条件生成
视图插值合成连贯视频

papers.title: Attention Residuals
papers.abstract:
Residual connections with PreNorm are standard in modern LLMs, yet they accumulate all layer outputs with fixed unit weights. This uniform aggregation causes uncontrolled hidden-state growth with depth, progressively diluting each layer's contribution. We propose Attention Residuals (AttnRes), which replaces this fixed accumulation with softmax attention over preceding layer outputs, allowing each layer to selectively aggregate earlier representations with learned, input-dependent weights. To address the memory and communication overhead of attending over all preceding layer outputs for large-scale model training, we introduce Block AttnRes, which partitions layers into blocks and attends over block-level representations, reducing the memory footprint while preserving most of the gains of full AttnRes. Combined with cache-based pipeline communication and a two-phase computation strategy, Block AttnRes becomes a practical drop-in replacement for standard residual connections with minimal overhead.
  Scaling law experiments confirm that the improvement is consistent across model sizes, and ablations validate the benefit of content-dependent depth-wise selection. We further integrate AttnRes into the Kimi Linear architecture (48B total / 3B activated parameters) and pre-train on 1.4T tokens, where AttnRes mitigates PreNorm dilution, yielding more uniform output magnitudes and gradient distribution across depth, and improves downstream performance across all evaluated tasks.

structured_summary.chinese_summary: 提出了一种新的残差连接方法，通过注意力机制选择性地聚合前一层的表示，解决了深度网络中隐藏状态增长的问题。
structured_summary.pain_point: 传统残差连接中固定权重的层间累积导致隐藏状态随深度增长，逐层贡献被稀释。
structured_summary.core_value: 通过引入注意力机制，使每一层能够根据输入选择性地聚合前一层的表示，提高了模型性能。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: 提出了注意力残差（AttnRes）和块注意力残差（Block AttnRes）两种方法。
structured_summary.quantitative_results: 实验证明，改进在不同规模模型上表现一致，且块注意力残差在保持大部分性能提升的同时减少了内存开销。
structured_summary.limitations: 当前方法在大规模模型训练中仍存在一定的内存和通信开销。
key_contributions: 提出了一种新的残差连接方法，通过注意力机制选择性地聚合前一层的表示。
提出了块注意力残差方法，通过分块处理降低了内存和通信开销。
结合基于缓存的流水线通信和两阶段计算策略，使Block AttnRes成为标准残差连接的可替换方案
application_scenarios: 适用于大规模语言模型的训练和推理
适用于需要高效内存管理的分布式训练场景
technical_highlights: 通过注意力机制实现输入依赖的深度选择性聚合
提出了块注意力残差方法，有效降低了内存和通信开销

papers.title: Mixture-of-Depths Attention
papers.abstract: Scaling depth is a key driver for large language models (LLMs). Yet, as LLMs become deeper, they often suffer from signal degradation: informative features formed in shallow layers are gradually diluted by repeated residual updates, making them harder to recover in deeper layers. We introduce mixture-of-depths attention (MoDA), a mechanism that allows each attention head to attend to sequence KV pairs at the current layer and depth KV pairs from preceding layers. We further describe a hardware-efficient algorithm for MoDA that resolves non-contiguous memory-access patterns, achieving 97.3% of FlashAttention-2's efficiency at a sequence length of 64K. Experiments on 1.5B-parameter models demonstrate that MoDA consistently outperforms strong baselines. Notably, it improves average perplexity by 0.2 across 10 validation benchmarks and increases average performance by 2.11% on 10 downstream tasks, with a negligible 3.7% FLOPs computational overhead. We also find that combining MoDA with post-norm yields better performance than using it with pre-norm. These results suggest that MoDA is a promising primitive for depth scaling. Code is released at https://github.com/hustvl/MoDA .

structured_summary.chinese_summary: MoDA 提高了深度语言模型的性能，降低了计算开销。
structured_summary.pain_point: 深度语言模型中浅层特征在深层被逐渐稀释，难以恢复。
structured_summary.core_value: MoDA 机制允许每个注意力头同时关注当前层和前层的 KV 对，提高了模型性能。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: MoDA 通过混合当前层和前层的 KV 对来增强注意力机制。
structured_summary.quantitative_results: 在 1.5B 参数模型上，MoDA 降低了平均困惑度 0.2，提升了下游任务性能 2.11%，计算开销增加 3.7%。
structured_summary.competitors: MoDA 与 FlashAttention-2 相比，效率更高。
structured_summary.limitations: MoDA 仍需进一步研究以适应更深层次的模型。
key_contributions: 引入了混合深度注意力机制
提高了模型的深度扩展性
降低了计算开销
technical_highlights: 硬件高效算法解决了非连续内存访问问题
与后归一化结合效果更佳

papers.title: Effective Distillation to Hybrid xLSTM Architectures
papers.abstract: There have been numerous attempts to distill quadratic attention-based large language models (LLMs) into sub-quadratic linearized architectures. However, despite extensive research, such distilled models often fail to match the performance of their teacher LLMs on various downstream tasks. We set out the goal of lossless distillation, which we define in terms of tolerance-corrected Win-and-Tie rates between student and teacher on sets of tasks. To this end, we introduce an effective distillation pipeline for xLSTM-based students. We propose an additional merging stage, where individually linearized experts are combined into a single model. We show the effectiveness of this pipeline by distilling base and instruction-tuned models from the Llama, Qwen, and Olmo families. In many settings, our xLSTM-based students recover most of the teacher's performance, and even exceed it on some downstream tasks. Our contributions are an important step towards more energy-efficient and cost-effective replacements for transformer-based LLMs.

structured_summary.chinese_summary: 通过引入有效的蒸馏管道，xLSTM学生模型在多个下游任务上恢复了教师模型的大部分性能。
structured_summary.pain_point: 现有蒸馏方法难以在保持性能的同时将大型语言模型压缩为亚二次线性化架构。
structured_summary.core_value: 提出了一种新的蒸馏方法，使得xLSTM学生模型在多个任务上接近或超越教师模型的性能。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: 提出了一种包含合并阶段的蒸馏管道，将个体线性化专家合并为单一模型。
structured_summary.quantitative_results: 在多个任务上，xLSTM学生模型恢复了教师模型的大部分性能，甚至在某些任务上超过了教师模型。
structured_summary.limitations: 未来工作将探索更多任务和更大规模的模型。
key_contributions: 提出了一种新的蒸馏方法
展示了xLSTM学生模型的有效性
在多个任务上恢复了教师模型的性能
application_scenarios: 能源效率更高的语言模型替代
成本效益更高的语言模型部署
technical_highlights: 引入合并阶段
xLSTM架构的有效性

papers.title: Anatomy of a Lie: A Multi-Stage Diagnostic Framework for Tracing Hallucinations in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) frequently "hallucinate" - generate plausible yet factually incorrect statements - posing a critical barrier to their trustworthy deployment. In this work, we propose a new paradigm for diagnosing hallucinations, recasting them from static output errors into dynamic pathologies of a model's computational cognition. Our framework is grounded in a normative principle of computational rationality, allowing us to model a VLM's generation as a dynamic cognitive trajectory. We design a suite of information-theoretic probes that project this trajectory onto an interpretable, low-dimensional Cognitive State Space. Our central discovery is a governing principle we term the geometric-information duality: a cognitive trajectory's geometric abnormality within this space is fundamentally equivalent to its high information-theoretic surprisal. Hallucination detection is counts as a geometric anomaly detection problem. Evaluated across diverse settings - from rigorous binary QA (POPE) and comprehensive reasoning (MME) to unconstrained open-ended captioning (MS-COCO) - our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance. Crucially, it operates with high efficiency under weak supervision and remains highly robust even when calibration data is heavily contaminated. This approach enables a causal attribution of failures, mapping observable errors to distinct pathological states: perceptual instability (measured by Perceptual Entropy), logical-causal failure (measured by Inferential Conflict), and decisional ambiguity (measured by Decision Entropy). Ultimately, this opens a path toward building AI systems whose reasoning is transparent, auditable, and diagnosable by design.

structured_summary.chinese_title: 谎言剖析：视觉-语言模型幻觉的多阶段诊断框架
structured_summary.chinese_summary: 提出了一种新的幻觉诊断框架，通过几何信息二元性原理实现高效幻觉检测。
structured_summary.pain_point: 视觉-语言模型生成的幻觉导致其不可靠部署。
structured_summary.core_value: 通过几何信息二元性原理，实现幻觉检测的高效性。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: 设计了一套信息论探针，将认知轨迹映射到可解释的低维认知空间。
structured_summary.quantitative_results: 在多种场景下达到最佳性能。
structured_summary.limitations: 未来需探索更多应用场景。
key_contributions: 提出几何信息二元性原理
设计信息论探针
高效幻觉检测
technical_highlights: 几何信息二元性原理
低维认知空间映射

papers.title: ViFeEdit: A Video-Free Tuner of Your Video Diffusion Transformer
papers.abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have demonstrated remarkable scalability and quality in image and video generation, prompting growing interest in extending them to controllable generation and editing tasks. However, compared to the image counterparts, progress in video control and editing remains limited, mainly due to the scarcity of paired video data and the high computational cost of training video diffusion models. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a video-free tuning framework termed ViFeEdit for video diffusion transformers. Without requiring any forms of video training data, ViFeEdit achieves versatile video generation and editing, adapted solely with 2D images. At the core of our approach is an architectural reparameterization that decouples spatial independence from the full 3D attention in modern video diffusion transformers, which enables visually faithful editing while maintaining temporal consistency with only minimal additional parameters. Moreover, this design operates in a dual-path pipeline with separate timestep embeddings for noise scheduling, exhibiting strong adaptability to diverse conditioning signals. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method delivers promising results of controllable video generation and editing with only minimal training on 2D image data. Codes are available https://github.com/Lexie-YU/ViFeEdit.

structured_summary.chinese_title: ViFeEdit：无需视频的视频扩散变压器调优框架
structured_summary.chinese_summary: ViFeEdit 通过仅使用 2D 图像实现了灵活的视频生成和编辑。
structured_summary.pain_point: 视频控制和编辑进展受限于缺乏配对视频数据和高计算成本。
structured_summary.core_value: 通过架构重参数化实现视觉忠实编辑和时间一致性。
structured_summary.technical_architecture: 采用双路径管道和分离的时间步嵌入。
structured_summary.limitations: 未来工作将探索更多应用场景。
key_contributions: 无需视频训练数据即可实现视频编辑
通过架构重参数化实现视觉忠实编辑和时间一致性
technical_highlights: 双路径管道设计
分离的时间步嵌入
